purpose: Prospectively frozen confirmatory audit of online delivery feedback.

frozen_analysis_plan.development_evidence: The earlier disjoint 20-seed confirmation found fso minus fso_no_feedback AUAC = -0.002439236111111104.
frozen_analysis_plan.primary_estimand: Paired seed-level mean AUAC difference: fso minus fso_no_feedback.
frozen_analysis_plan.support_rule: Support an online-feedback benefit only when the two-sided 95 percent seed-bootstrap interval has a lower bound greater than zero.
frozen_analysis_plan.harm_rule: Call online feedback harmful in this declared model only when the interval upper bound is below zero.
frozen_analysis_plan.otherwise: Classify the effect as inconclusive and make no benefit claim.
frozen_analysis_plan.default_rule: Recommend feedback disabled unless the support rule is met.
frozen_analysis_plan.multiplicity: One confirmatory primary contrast; secondary metrics are descriptive.
